tasks.label: coverage
tasks.command: dotnet tool restore && dotnet test DialogueDown.sln --settings coverage.runsettings --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" && dotnet reportgenerator "-reports:tests/DialogueDown.Tests/TestResults/**/coverage.cobertura.xml" "-targetdir:coverage-report" "-reporttypes:Html;MarkdownSummary;Cobertura"

tasks.label: docs: lint oss markdown
tasks.command: markdownlint README.md CONTRIBUTING.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md SECURITY.md CHANGELOG.md .github/pull_request_template.md

tasks.label: docs: check links
tasks.command: lychee --no-progress --timeout 10 README.md CONTRIBUTING.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md SECURITY.md CHANGELOG.md .github/pull_request_template.md
